title: PodGroup Scheduling — DisruptionTarget
text:
When the scheduler preempts a PodGroup to make room for higher-priority PodGroups or
Pods, it sets this condition to
True
with reason
PreemptionByScheduler
.
You can check conditions with:
kubectl get podgroup <name> -o
jsonpath
=
'{.status.conditions}'

Learn about the
Workload API
.
See how to
reference a Workload
in a Pod.
Read about
gang scheduling
.
